case_title: WIN NAING OO VS. FRANK HANS PREUSS

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OO, WIN NAING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PREUSS, FRANK HANS $2,846.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,896.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PREUSS, FRANK HANS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-27-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-27-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF WIN NAING OO IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT FRANK HAS PREUSS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY OO, WIN NAING AS TO DEFENDANT PREUSS, FRANK HANS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2019 - JUDGMENT.
